---
title: "GB7CAM Packet System"
---

<img src="images/main_logo.png" class="centered-image">

## AX.25 Packet Node GB7CAM

Keeper: Ian Henry [(G0LFT)](https://g0lft.org)

**Status: Operational**

---

## Quick Info

- Band: 2m  
- Frequency: 144.950 MHz (TX/RX)  
- Mode: AX.25 Packet / Mailbox  
- Locator: JO02AD (Harston)

---

## Services

- 📡 [Node Information](node.qmd)
- 💬 [BBS Access](bbs.qmd)
- 📬 [Mail System](mail.qmd)
- 📊 [System Status](status.qmd)

---

This site provides access information for the GB7CAM packet radio node and associated services.
